framework.name: JWT act/obo nested claims for agent delegation
framework.description: Encoding dual identity (agent + delegating user) via act.sub and obo claims in JWTs, with nested claims for multi-hop chains (user → agent → agent). This is the concrete mechanism for how OAuth composition handles delegation chains.
framework.raw_quote: Tokens include both agent and user identities using sub and act.sub claims, enabling secure attribution, least-privilege enforcement, and traceability.

source.title: Understanding "On-Behalf-Of" in AI agent authentication - Scalekit
